questions.explanation: We better hope you know what a crow looks like.
questions.explanationCorrect: Nice. You know what a crow looks like.
questions.explanationIncorrect: Oh boy, this might not be the game for you...
questions.name: Just a pic of a crow

questions.explanation: If you want to be technical, this is actually 4 crows.
questions.explanationCorrect: If you want to be technical, this is actually 4 crows.
questions.explanationIncorrect: Seriously? This is one of the easy questions.
questions.name: 4 Crows pic

questions.explanation: A raven was quothed saying that, famously.
questions.name: Nevermore
questions.revealCaption: This is Edgar Allen Poe, neither a raven nor a crow.

questions.explanation: This character was played by Russell Crowe in Gladiator (2000).
questions.revealCaption: Entertained yet? or whatever the quote is.

questions.explanation: This is Crow T. Robot from Mystery Science Theater 3000, which premiered on KTMA-TV in St. Paul, MN in 1988.
questions.name: Crow T Robot

questions.explanation: Shrek 2 fans will know this is Accidentally in Love by the Counting Crows
questions.name: Accidentally in Love by Counting Crows

questions.explanation: You probably thought this was a Crowbar, but it is actually a Flat Pry Bar.
questions.name: Flat Bar (Not Crowbar)

questions.explanation: Mpls City SC, affectionately known as The Crows.
questions.name: Mpls City Logo
questions.revealCaption: This logo would have been too easy for some people.

celebrationMessages: Congratulations, ASS. You should be proud.
The murder of crows salutes you, ASS.
ASS has entered the record books. Truly a moment.
Well played, ASS. The crows were watching.

labels: Zero crows. Not even a feather.
Still zero. The crows have forgotten you.
Zero again. Are you okay?
scoreTiers.cta: Maybe Minneapolis City SC can show you the way. 🐦‍⬛

labels: One crow. Technically a start.
Back for more? Still just one. The crows are not impressed.
One crow, again. Consistent in your inconsistency.
scoreTiers.cta: There's more to learn. Start at mplscitysc.com.

labels: Two crows. The birds are barely aware of you.
Back for more? 2/10 again. The crows have noted this.
Two crows, three times. The murder is unmoved.
scoreTiers.cta: Keep going. Minneapolis City SC rewards curiosity.

labels: Three crows. A flicker of crow awareness.
Back for more? 3/10 again. A flicker, persisting.
Three crows, multiple tries. The flicker remains unignited.
scoreTiers.cta: Want to know more? The Crows play in Minneapolis. mplscitysc.com

labels: Four crows. Below average, but the effort is noted.
4/10 again. The crows respect the effort, not the score.
Four crows, again. The crows are getting impatient.
scoreTiers.cta: The Crows want you to do better: mplscitysc.com

labels: Five crows. Exactly average. The crows shrug.
Back for more? Still 5/10. The crows continue to shrug.
Five crows, three times. A perfectly mediocre commitment.
scoreTiers.cta: Right in the middle. Minneapolis City SC is anything but average.

labels: Six crows. Above average. The murder takes notice.
Back for more? 6/10 again. The murder is cautiously optimistic.
Six crows, multiple tries. The murder has warmed to you.
scoreTiers.cta: Getting there. Minneapolis City SC sees your potential.

labels: Seven crows. Crow-curious and capable.
Back for more? 7/10 again. Dependably crow-aware.
Seven crows, three times. The crows are starting to trust you.
scoreTiers.cta: You know the Crows. Now come see them: mplscitysc.com

labels: Eight crows. Nearly crow-certified.
Back for more? 8/10 again. Two crows keep escaping you.
Eight crows, again. The same two crows are laughing at you.
scoreTiers.cta: So close. Minneapolis City SC doesn't miss.

labels: Nine crows. One slip. Agonizing.
Back for more? 9/10 again. One crow haunts you.
Nine crows, three times. That one crow lives rent-free in your head.
scoreTiers.cta: Almost a perfect score. Minneapolis City SC wants you to join the murder.

labels: Certified Crow Expert. 🐦‍⬛
Perfect again. You are the crow.
Perfect, again. We're starting to think you ARE a crow.
scoreTiers.cta: You were made for this. Minneapolis City SC awaits.
